prompt:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。

游戏描述：创建一个太空射击游戏，玩家控制飞船躲避陨石并消灭敌人，要有 Boss 战和道具系统

请生成一个完整的、可立即运行的 HTML5 游戏。要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件，包含所有 CSS 和 JavaScript
2. 使用 Canvas API 渲染
3. 包含完整的游戏循环、玩家控制、碰撞检测
4. 有得分系统和游戏结束判定
5. 添加精美的视觉效果和动画
6. 确保游戏有趣且可玩

只返回纯 HTML 代码，不要有任何解释。代码应该以 <!DOCTYPE html> 开头。
gameCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>星际猎手 - 太空射击游戏</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { background: #000; overflow: hidden; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 100vh; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; }
canvas { display: block; border: 1px solid #333; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

canvas.width = 480;
canvas.height = 720;

// Game state
let gameState = 'menu'; // menu, playing, gameover, paused
let score = 0;
let highScore = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('spaceHighScore')) || 0;
let wave = 1;
let waveTimer = 0;
let waveDelay = 300;
let bossSpawned = false;
let bossDefeated = 0;
let screenShake = 0;
let screenShakeX = 0;
let screenShakeY = 0;
let starField = [];
let particles = [];
let explosions = [];
let damageNumbers = [];
let menuTimer = 0;

// Initialize starfield
for (let i = 0; i < 150; i++) {
    starField.push({
        x: Math.random() * canvas.width,
        y: Math.random() * canvas.height,
        speed: Math.random() * 2 + 0.5,
        size: Math.random() * 2 + 0.5,
        brightness: Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.5
    });
}

// Player
const player = {
    x: canvas.width / 2,
    y: canvas.height - 100,
    width: 32,
    height: 40,
    speed: 5,
    hp: 100,
    maxHp: 100,
    lives: 3,
    fireRate: 10,
    fireTimer: 0,
    bulletDamage: 10,
    bulletSpeed: 8,
    bulletType: 'normal', // normal, spread, laser, missile
    powerUpTimer: 0,
    shield: 0,
    shieldMax: 50,
    invincible: 0,
    thrustParticleTimer: 0,
    combo: 0,
    comboTimer: 0,
    magnetRange: 0,
    dx: 0,
    dy: 0
};

let bullets = [];
let enemyBullets = [];
let enemies = [];
let powerUps = [];
let bosses = [];

// Input
const keys = {};
let mouseX = canvas.width / 2;
let mouseY = canvas.height / 2;
let mouseDown = false;
let touchActive = false;

document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    keys[e.code] = true;
    if (e.code === 'Space' || e.code === 'ArrowUp' || e.code === 'ArrowDown') e.preventDefault();
    if (gameState === 'menu' && (e.code === 'Space' || e.code === 'Enter')) startGame();
    if (gameState === 'gameover' && (e.code === 'Space' || e.code === 'Enter')) startGame();
    if (gameState === 'playing' && e.code === 'KeyP') gameState = 'paused';
    else if (gameState === 'paused' && e.code === 'KeyP') gameState = 'playing';
});
document.addEventListener('keyup', e => keys[e.code] = false);

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    mouseX = (e.clientX - rect.left) * (canvas.width / rect.width);
    mouseY = (e.clientY - rect.top) * (canvas.height / rect.height);
});
canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
    mouseDown = true;
    if (gameState === 'menu' || gameState === 'gameover') startGame();
});
canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => mouseDown = false);

canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
    e.preventDefault();
    touchActive = true;
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    mouseX = (e.touches[0].clientX - rect.left) * (canvas.width / rect.width);
    mouseY = (e.touches[0].clientY - rect.top) * (canvas.height / rect.height);
    if (gameState === 'menu' || gameState === 'gameover') startGame();
});
canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', e => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    mouseX = (e.touches[0].clientX - rect.left) * (canvas.width / rect.width);
    mouseY = (e.touches[0].clientY - rect.top) * (canvas.height / rect.height);
});
canvas.addEventListener('touchend', e => {
    e.preventDefault();
    touchActive = false;
});

function startGame() {
    gameState = 'playing';
    score = 0;
    wave = 1;
    waveTimer = 0;
    bossSpawned = false;
    bossDefeated = 0;
    player.x = canvas.width / 2;
    player.y = canvas.height - 100;
    player.hp = player.maxHp;
    player.lives = 3;
    player.fireRate = 10;
    player.fireTimer = 0;
    player.bulletDamage = 10;
    player.bulletSpeed = 8;
    player.bulletType = 'normal';
    player.powerUpTimer = 0;
    player.shield = 0;
    player.invincible = 0;
    player.combo = 0;
    player.comboTimer = 0;
    player.magnetRange = 0;
    bullets = [];
    enemyBullets = [];
    enemies = [];
    powerUps = [];
    bosses = [];
    particles = [];
    explosions = [];
    damageNumbers = [];
}

// Spawn enemy types
function spawnEnemy(type) {
    let e = {
        x: Math.random() * (canvas.width - 40) + 20,
        y: -40,
        width: 30,
        height: 30,
        type: type,
        hp: 20,
        maxHp: 20,
        speed: 1.5,
        fireTimer: Math.random() * 60,
        fireRate: 120,
        points: 100,
        angle: 0,
        phase: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
        behavior: 'straight'
    };

    switch(type) {
        case 'scout':
            e.width = 24; e.height = 24;
            e.hp = 15; e.maxHp = 15;
            e.speed = 2.5;
            e.points = 50;
            e.fireRate = 180;
            e.behavior = 'zigzag';
            break;
        case 'fighter':
            e.width = 30; e.height = 30;
            e.hp = 30 + wave * 5;
            e.maxHp = e.hp;
            e.speed = 1.5;
            e.points = 100;
            e.fireRate = 90;
            break;
        case 'tank':
            e.width = 40; e.height = 40;
            e.hp = 80 + wave * 10;
            e.maxHp = e.hp;
            e.speed = 0.8;
            e.points = 200;
            e.fireRate = 60;
            e.behavior = 'straight';
            break;
        case 'bomber':
            e.width = 35; e.height = 35;
            e.hp = 40 + wave * 5;
            e.maxHp = e.hp;
            e.speed = 1.2;
            e.points = 150;
            e.fireRate = 150;
            e.behavior = 'sine';
            break;
        case 'elite':
            e.width = 35; e.height = 35;
            e.hp = 60 + wave * 10;
            e.maxHp = e.hp;
            e.speed = 2;
            e.points = 300;
            e.fireRate = 45;
            e.behavior = 'chase';
            break;
    }
    enemies.push(e);
}

function spawnBoss(level) {
    let b = {
        x: canvas.width / 2,
        y: -80,
        targetY: 100,
        width: 80,
        height: 80,
        hp: 500 + level * 300,
        maxHp: 500 + level * 300,
        speed: 1,
        phase: 0,
        fireTimer: 0,
        firePattern: 0,
        patternTimer: 0,
        patternDuration: 180,
        level: level,
        points: 2000 + level * 1000,
        entering: true,
        shieldActive: false,
        shieldTimer: 0,
        rage: false,
        hitFlash: 0,
        parts: []
    };

    // Boss parts (turrets)
    if (level >= 2) {
        b.parts.push({ xOff: -35, yOff: 20, hp: 100 + level * 50, maxHp: 100 + level * 50, fireTimer: 0, alive: true });
        b.parts.push({ xOff: 35, yOff: 20, hp: 100 + level * 50, maxHp: 100 + level * 50, fireTimer: 0, alive: true });
    }
    if (level >= 3) {
        b.parts.push({ xOff: 0, yOff: -30, hp: 150 + level * 50, maxHp: 150 + level * 50, fireTimer: 0, alive: true });
    }

    bosses.push(b);
    bossSpawned = true;
}

function spawnPowerUp(x, y) {
    const types = ['health', 'spread', 'laser', 'missile', 'shield', 'speed', 'magnet', 'bomb'];
    const weights = [15, 15, 12, 12, 12, 10, 10, 8];
    let total = weights.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
    let r = Math.random() * total;
    let type = types[0];
    for (let i = 0; i < weights.length; i++) {
        r -= weights[i];
        if (r <= 0) { type = types[i]; break; }
    }

    powerUps.push({
        x: x,
        y: y,
        width: 20,
        height: 20,
        type: type,
        speed: 1,
        timer: 0,
        glow: 0
    });
}

function fireBullet() {
    const bx = player.x;
    const by = player.y - player.height / 2;

    switch(player.bulletType) {
        case 'normal':
            bullets.push({ x: bx, y: by, dx: 0, dy: -player.bulletSpeed, width: 4, height: 12, damage: player.bulletDamage, type: 'normal', pierce: 0 });
            break;
        case 'spread':
            for (let a = -20; a <= 20; a += 10) {
                const rad = a * Math.PI / 180;
                bullets.push({ x: bx, y: by, dx: Math.sin(rad) * player.bulletSpeed, dy: -Math.cos(rad) * player.bulletSpeed, width: 3, height: 10, damage: player.bulletDamage * 0.7, type: 'spread', pierce: 0 });
            }
            break;
        case 'laser':
            bullets.push({ x: bx, y: by, dx: 0, dy: -player.bulletSpeed * 1.5, width: 6, height: 20, damage: player.bulletDamage * 1.5, type: 'laser', pierce: 2 });
            break;
        case 'missile':
            bullets.push({ x: bx - 10, y: by, dx: 0, dy: -player.bulletSpeed * 0.8, width: 6, height: 14, damage: player.bulletDamage * 2, type: 'missile', pierce: 0, homing: true, target: null });
            bullets.push({ x: bx + 10, y: by, dx: 0, dy: -player.bulletSpeed * 0.8, width: 6, height: 14, damage: player.bulletDamage * 2, type: 'missile', pierce: 0, homing: true, target: null });
            break;
    }
}

function createExplosion(x, y, size, color) {
    explosions.push({
        x: x, y: y,
        size: size,
        maxSize: size,
        timer: 0,
        maxTimer: 30,
        color: color || '#ff6600',
        particles: []
    });

    for (let i = 0; i < size * 2; i++) {
        const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
        const speed = Math.random() * size / 5 + 1;
        particles.push({
            x: x, y: y,
            dx: Math.cos(angle) * speed,
            dy: Math.sin(angle) * speed,
            life: Math.random() * 30 + 20,
            maxLife: 50,
            size: Math.random() * 3 + 1,
            color: color || (Math.random() > 0.5 ? '#ff6600' : '#ffcc00')
        });
    }

    screenShake = Math.min(screenShake + size / 3, 15);
}

function addDamageNumber(x, y, damage, color) {
    damageNumbers.push({
        x: x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 20,
        y: y,
        text: Math.floor(damage).toString(),
        color: color || '#fff',
        life: 40,
        dy: -2
    });
}

function collides(a, b) {
    return a.x - a.width/2 < b.x + b.width/2 &&
           a.x + a.width/2 > b.x - b.width/2 &&
           a.y - a.height/2 < b.y + b.height/2 &&
           a.y + a.height/2 > b.y - b.height/2;
}

function dist(x1, y1, x2, y2) {
    return Math.sqrt((x2-x1)**2 + (y2-y1)**2);
}

// Update functions
function updatePlayer() {
    let moveX = 0, moveY = 0;

    if (keys['ArrowLeft'] || keys['KeyA']) moveX -= 1;
    if (keys['ArrowRight'] || keys['KeyD']) moveX += 1;
    if (keys['ArrowUp'] || keys['KeyW']) moveY -= 1;
    if (keys['ArrowDown'] || keys['KeyS']) moveY += 1;

    if (touchActive || mouseDown) {
        const dx = mouseX - player.x;
        const dy = mouseY - player.y;
        const d = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy);
        if (d > 5) {
            moveX = dx / d;
            moveY = dy / d;
        }
    }

    // Normalize diagonal
    if (moveX !== 0 && moveY !== 0) {
        moveX *= 0.707;
        moveY *= 0.707;
    }

    player.dx = moveX * player.speed;
    player.dy = moveY * player.speed;
    player.x += player.dx;
    player.y += player.dy;

    // Bounds
    player.x = Math.max(player.width/2, Math.min(canvas.width - player.width/2, player.x));
    player.y = Math.max(player.height/2, Math.min(canvas.height - player.height/2, player.y));

    // Fire
    player.fireTimer++;
    if (player.fireTimer >= player.fireRate) {
        player.fireTimer = 0;
        fireBullet();
    }

    // Power up timer
    if (player.powerUpTimer > 0) {
        player.powerUpTimer--;
        if (player.powerUpTimer <= 0) {
            player.bulletType = 'normal';
            player.fireRate = 10;
            player.bulletDamage = 10;
            player.speed = 5;
            player.magnetRange = 0;
        }
    }

    if (player.invincible > 0) player.invincible--;
    if (player.comboTimer > 0) {
        player.comboTimer--;
        if (player.comboTimer <= 0) player.combo = 0;
    }

    // Thrust particles
    player.thrustParticleTimer++;
    if (player.thrustParticleTimer >= 2) {
        player.thrustParticleTimer = 0;
        particles.push({
            x: player.x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 10,
            y: player.y + player.height/2,
            dx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5,
            dy: Math.random() * 2 + 1,
            life: 15 + Math.random() * 10,
            maxLife: 25,
            size: Math.random() * 3 + 1,
            color: Math.random() > 0.5 ? '#00aaff' : '#0066ff'
        });
    }
}

function updateBullets() {
    for (let i = bullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        let b = bullets[i];

        // Homing missiles
        if (b.homing) {
            let closest = null;
            let closestDist = Infinity;
            [...enemies, ...bosses].forEach(e => {
                let d = dist(b.x, b.y, e.x, e.y);
                if (d < closestDist) { closestDist = d; closest = e; }
            });
            if (closest) {
                let angle = Math.atan2(closest.y - b.y, closest.x - b.x);
                let currentAngle = Math.atan2(b.dy, b.dx);
                let diff = angle - currentAngle;
                while (diff > Math.PI) diff -= Math.PI * 2;
                while (diff < -Math.PI) diff += Math.PI * 2;
                currentAngle += diff * 0.08;
                let speed = Math.sqrt(b.dx*b.dx + b.dy*b.dy);
                b.dx = Math.cos(currentAngle) * speed;
                b.dy = Math.sin(currentAngle) * speed;
            }
            // Trail
            particles.push({
                x: b.x, y: b.y,
                dx: (Math.random()-0.5)*0.5, dy: Math.random()*0.5,
                life: 10, maxLife: 10, size: 2,
                color: '#ff4400'
            });
        }

        b.x += b.dx;
        b.y += b.dy;

        if (b.y < -20 || b.y > canvas.height + 20 || b.x < -20 || b.x > canvas.width + 20) {
            bullets.splice(i, 1);
        }
    }

    for (let i = enemyBullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        let b = enemyBullets[i];
        b.x += b.dx;
        b.y += b.dy;
        if (b.timer !== undefined) b.timer++;

        if (b.y < -20 || b.y > canvas.height + 20 || b.x < -20 || b.x > canvas.width + 20) {
            enemyBullets.splice(i, 1);
        }
    }
}

function updateEnemies() {
    for (let i = enemies.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        let e = enemies[i];
        e.angle += 0.02;

        switch(e.behavior) {
            case 'straight':
                e.y += e.speed;
                break;
            case 'zigzag':
                e.y += e.speed;
                e.x += Math.sin(e.phase + e.y * 0.03) * 2;
                break;
            case 'sine':
                e.y += e.speed;
                e.x += Math.sin(e.phase + e.y * 0.02) * 3;
                break;
            case 'chase':
                let dx = player.x - e.x;
                let dy = player.y - e.y;
                let d = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy);
                if (d > 0) {
                    e.x += (dx/d) * e.speed * 0.5;
                    e.y += Math.max(e.speed * 0.3, (dy/d) * e.speed * 0.5);
                }
                break;
        }

        // Fire
        e.fireTimer++;
        if (e.fireTimer >= e.fireRate && e.y > 0 && e.y < canvas.height * 0.7) {
            e.fireTimer = 0;
            let angle = Math.atan2(player.y - e.y, player.x - e.x);
            let speed = 3;

            if (e.type === 'tank') {
                for (let a = -15; a <= 15; a += 15) {
                    let rad = angle + a * Math.PI / 180;
                    enemyBullets.push({ x: e.x, y: e.y + e.height/2, dx: Math.cos(rad)*speed, dy: Math.sin(rad)*speed, width: 5, height: 5, damage: 10, type: 'enemy' });
                }
            } else if (e.type === 'bomber') {
                for (let a = 0; a < 360; a += 60) {
                    let rad = a * Math.PI / 180;
                    enemyBullets.push({ x: e.x, y: e.y, dx: Math.cos(rad)*2.5, dy: Math.sin(rad)*2.5, width: 4, height: 4, damage: 8, type: 'enemy' });
                }
            } else {
                enemyBullets.push({ x: e.x, y: e.y + e.height/2, dx: Math.cos(angle)*speed, dy: Math.sin(angle)*speed, width: 4, height: 4, damage: 8, type: 'enemy' });
            }
        }

        // Off screen
        if (e.y > canvas.height + 60) {
            enemies.splice(i, 1);
        }
    }
}

function updateBosses() {
    for (let i = bosses.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        let b = bosses[i];

        if (b.entering) {
            b.y += 1;
            if (b.y >= b.targetY) {
                b.entering = false;
            }
            continue;
        }

        b.phase += 0.02;
        b.x = canvas.width/2 + Math.sin(b.phase) * (canvas.width/3 - 50);
        b.y = b.targetY + Math.sin(b.phase * 1.5) * 30;

        if (b.hitFlash > 0) b.hitFlash--;

        // Rage mode at 30% hp
        if (!b.rage && b.hp < b.maxHp * 0.3) {
            b.rage = true;
            screenShake = 10;
        }

        // Fire patterns
        b.patternTimer++;
        let rateMultiplier = b.rage ? 0.5 : 1;

        if (b.patternTimer >= b.patternDuration * rateMultiplier) {
            b.patternTimer = 0;
            b.firePattern = (b.firePattern + 1) % 4;
        }

        b.fireTimer++;
        let fireDelay = b.rage ? 8 : 15;

        switch(b.firePattern) {
            case 0: // Spiral
                if (b.fireTimer >= fireDelay) {
                    b.fireTimer = 0;
                    let angle = b.phase * 5;
                    for (let j = 0; j < 2; j++) {
                        let a = angle + j * Math.PI;
                        enemyBullets.push({ x: b.x, y: b.y + b.height/2, dx: Math.cos(a)*3, dy: Math.sin(a)*3, width: 5, height: 5, damage: 12, type: 'boss' });
                    }
                }
                break;
            case 1: // Aimed burst
                if (b.fireTimer >= fireDelay * 2) {
                    b.fireTimer = 0;
                    let angle = Math.atan2(player.y - b.y, player.x - b.x);
                    for (let j = -2; j <= 2; j++) {
                        let a = angle + j * 0.15;
                        enemyBullets.push({ x: b.x, y: b.y + b.height/2, dx: Math.cos(a)*4, dy: Math.sin(a)*4, width: 6, height: 6, damage: 15, type: 'boss' });
                    }
                }
                break;
            case 2: // Ring
                if (b.fireTimer >= fireDelay * 3) {
                    b.fireTimer = 0;
                    let count = b.rage ? 24 : 16;
                    for (let j = 0; j < count; j++) {
                        let a = (j / count) * Math.PI * 2;
                        enemyBullets.push({ x: b.x, y: b.y, dx: Math.cos(a)*2.5, dy: Math.sin(a)*2.5, width: 5, height: 5, damage: 10, type: 'boss' });
                    }
                }
                break;
            case 3: // Laser streams
                if (b.fireTimer >= 5) {
                    b.fireTimer = 0;
                    let angle = Math.atan2(player.y - b.y, player.x - b.x);
                    enemyBullets.push({ x: b.x - 30, y: b.y + b.height/2, dx: Math.cos(angle)*5, dy: Math.sin(angle)*5, width: 4, height: 8, damage: 8, type: 'boss' });
                    enemyBullets.push({ x: b.x + 30, y: b.y + b.height/2, dx: Math.cos(angle)*5, dy: Math.sin(angle)*5, width: 4, height: 8, damage: 8, type: 'boss' });
                }
                break;
        }

        // Parts fire
        b.parts.forEach(p => {
            if (!p.alive) return;
            p.fireTimer++;
            if (p.fireTimer >= 40) {
                p.fireTimer = 0;
                let px = b.x + p.xOff;
                let py = b.y + p.yOff;
                let angle = Math.atan2(player.y - py, player.x - px);
                enemyBullets.push({ x: px, y: py, dx: Math.cos(angle)*3.5, dy: Math.sin(angle)*3.5, width: 5, height: 5, damage: 10, type: 'boss' });
            }
        });

        // Boss defeated
        if (b.hp <= 0) {
            createExplosion(b.x, b.y, 60, '#ff0000');
            createExplosion(b.x - 30, b.y - 20, 40, '#ff6600');
            createExplosion(b.x + 30, b.y + 10, 40, '#ffcc00');
            score += b.points;
            bossDefeated++;
            bossSpawned = false;

            // Drop multiple power-ups
            for (let j = 0; j < 3; j++) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    spawnPowerUp(b.x + (Math.random()-0.5)*60, b.y + (Math.random()-0.5)*60);
                }, j * 100);
            }

            bosses.splice(i, 1);
            wave++;
        }
    }
}

function updatePowerUps() {
    for (let i = powerUps.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        let p = powerUps[i];
        p.y += p.speed;
        p.timer++;
        p.glow = Math.sin(p.timer * 0.1) * 0.3 + 0.7;

        // Magnet effect
        if (player.magnetRange > 0) {
            let d = dist(p.x, p.y, player.x, player.y);
            if (d < player.magnetRange) {
                let dx = player.x - p.x;
                let dy = player.y - p.y;
                p.x += dx / d * 3;
                p.y += dy / d * 3;
            }
        }

        if (p.y > canvas.height + 20) {
            powerUps.splice(i, 1);
        }
    }
}

function updateParticles() {
    for (let i = particles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        let p = particles[i];
        p.x += p.dx;
        p.y += p.dy;
        p.life--;
        p.dx *= 0.98;
        p.dy *= 0.98;
        if (p.life <= 0) particles.splice(i, 1);
    }

    for (let i = explosions.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {

message.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>星际猎手 - 太空射击游戏</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { background: #000; overflow: hidden; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 100vh; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; }
canvas { display: block; border: 1px solid #333; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

canvas.width = 480;
canvas.height = 720;

// Game state
let gameState = 'menu'; // menu, playing, gameover, paused
let score = 0;
let highScore = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('spaceHighScore')) || 0;
let wave = 1;
let waveTimer = 0;
let waveDelay = 300;
let bossSpawned = false;
let bossDefeated = 0;
let screenShake = 0;
let screenShakeX = 0;
let screenShakeY = 0;
let starField = [];
let particles = [];
let explosions = [];
let damageNumbers = [];
let menuTimer = 0;

// Initialize starfield
for (let i = 0; i < 150; i++) {
    starField.push({
        x: Math.random() * canvas.width,
        y: Math.random() * canvas.height,
        speed: Math.random() * 2 + 0.5,
        size: Math.random() * 2 + 0.5,
        brightness: Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.5
    });
}

// Player
const player = {
    x: canvas.width / 2,
    y: canvas.height - 100,
    width: 32,
    height: 40,
    speed: 5,
    hp: 100,
    maxHp: 100,
    lives: 3,
    fireRate: 10,
    fireTimer: 0,
    bulletDamage: 10,
    bulletSpeed: 8,
    bulletType: 'normal', // normal, spread, laser, missile
    powerUpTimer: 0,
    shield: 0,
    shieldMax: 50,
    invincible: 0,
    thrustParticleTimer: 0,
    combo: 0,
    comboTimer: 0,
    magnetRange: 0,
    dx: 0,
    dy: 0
};

let bullets = [];
let enemyBullets = [];
let enemies = [];
let powerUps = [];
let bosses = [];

// Input
const keys = {};
let mouseX = canvas.width / 2;
let mouseY = canvas.height / 2;
let mouseDown = false;
let touchActive = false;

document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    keys[e.code] = true;
    if (e.code === 'Space' || e.code === 'ArrowUp' || e.code === 'ArrowDown') e.preventDefault();
    if (gameState === 'menu' && (e.code === 'Space' || e.code === 'Enter')) startGame();
    if (gameState === 'gameover' && (e.code === 'Space' || e.code === 'Enter')) startGame();
    if (gameState === 'playing' && e.code === 'KeyP') gameState = 'paused';
    else if (gameState === 'paused' && e.code === 'KeyP') gameState = 'playing';
});
document.addEventListener('keyup', e => keys[e.code] = false);

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    mouseX = (e.clientX - rect.left) * (canvas.width / rect.width);
    mouseY = (e.clientY - rect.top) * (canvas.height / rect.height);
});
canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
    mouseDown = true;
    if (gameState === 'menu' || gameState === 'gameover') startGame();
});
canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => mouseDown = false);

canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
    e.preventDefault();
    touchActive = true;
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    mouseX = (e.touches[0].clientX - rect.left) * (canvas.width / rect.width);
    mouseY = (e.touches[0].clientY - rect.top) * (canvas.height / rect.height);
    if (gameState === 'menu' || gameState === 'gameover') startGame();
});
canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', e => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    mouseX = (e.touches[0].clientX - rect.left) * (canvas.width / rect.width);
    mouseY = (e.touches[0].clientY - rect.top) * (canvas.height / rect.height);
});
canvas.addEventListener('touchend', e => {
    e.preventDefault();
    touchActive = false;
});

function startGame() {
    gameState = 'playing';
    score = 0;
    wave = 1;
    waveTimer = 0;
    bossSpawned = false;
    bossDefeated = 0;
    player.x = canvas.width / 2;
    player.y = canvas.height - 100;
    player.hp = player.maxHp;
    player.lives = 3;
    player.fireRate = 10;
    player.fireTimer = 0;
    player.bulletDamage = 10;
    player.bulletSpeed = 8;
    player.bulletType = 'normal';
    player.powerUpTimer = 0;
    player.shield = 0;
    player.invincible = 0;
    player.combo = 0;
    player.comboTimer = 0;
    player.magnetRange = 0;
    bullets = [];
    enemyBullets = [];
    enemies = [];
    powerUps = [];
    bosses = [];
    particles = [];
    explosions = [];
    damageNumbers = [];
}

// Spawn enemy types
function spawnEnemy(type) {
    let e = {
        x: Math.random() * (canvas.width - 40) + 20,
        y: -40,
        width: 30,
        height: 30,
        type: type,
        hp: 20,
        maxHp: 20,
        speed: 1.5,
        fireTimer: Math.random() * 60,
        fireRate: 120,
        points: 100,
        angle: 0,
        phase: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
        behavior: 'straight'
    };

    switch(type) {
        case 'scout':
            e.width = 24; e.height = 24;
            e.hp = 15; e.maxHp = 15;
            e.speed = 2.5;
            e.points = 50;
            e.fireRate = 180;
            e.behavior = 'zigzag';
            break;
        case 'fighter':
            e.width = 30; e.height = 30;
            e.hp = 30 + wave * 5;
            e.maxHp = e.hp;
            e.speed = 1.5;
            e.points = 100;
            e.fireRate = 90;
            break;
        case 'tank':
            e.width = 40; e.height = 40;
            e.hp = 80 + wave * 10;
            e.maxHp = e.hp;
            e.speed = 0.8;
            e.points = 200;
            e.fireRate = 60;
            e.behavior = 'straight';
            break;
        case 'bomber':
            e.width = 35; e.height = 35;
            e.hp = 40 + wave * 5;
            e.maxHp = e.hp;
            e.speed = 1.2;
            e.points = 150;
            e.fireRate = 150;
            e.behavior = 'sine';
            break;
        case 'elite':
            e.width = 35; e.height = 35;
            e.hp = 60 + wave * 10;
            e.maxHp = e.hp;
            e.speed = 2;
            e.points = 300;
            e.fireRate = 45;
            e.behavior = 'chase';
            break;
    }
    enemies.push(e);
}

function spawnBoss(level) {
    let b = {
        x: canvas.width / 2,
        y: -80,
        targetY: 100,
        width: 80,
        height: 80,
        hp: 500 + level * 300,
        maxHp: 500 + level * 300,
        speed: 1,
        phase: 0,
        fireTimer: 0,
        firePattern: 0,
        patternTimer: 0,
        patternDuration: 180,
        level: level,
        points: 2000 + level * 1000,
        entering: true,
        shieldActive: false,
        shieldTimer: 0,
        rage: false,
        hitFlash: 0,
        parts: []
    };

    // Boss parts (turrets)
    if (level >= 2) {
        b.parts.push({ xOff: -35, yOff: 20, hp: 100 + level * 50, maxHp: 100 + level * 50, fireTimer: 0, alive: true });
        b.parts.push({ xOff: 35, yOff: 20, hp: 100 + level * 50, maxHp: 100 + level * 50, fireTimer: 0, alive: true });
    }
    if (level >= 3) {
        b.parts.push({ xOff: 0, yOff: -30, hp: 150 + level * 50, maxHp: 150 + level * 50, fireTimer: 0, alive: true });
    }

    bosses.push(b);
    bossSpawned = true;
}

function spawnPowerUp(x, y) {
    const types = ['health', 'spread', 'laser', 'missile', 'shield', 'speed', 'magnet', 'bomb'];
    const weights = [15, 15, 12, 12, 12, 10, 10, 8];
    let total = weights.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
    let r = Math.random() * total;
    let type = types[0];
    for (let i = 0; i < weights.length; i++) {
        r -= weights[i];
        if (r <= 0) { type = types[i]; break; }
    }

    powerUps.push({
        x: x,
        y: y,
        width: 20,
        height: 20,
        type: type,
        speed: 1,
        timer: 0,
        glow: 0
    });
}

function fireBullet() {
    const bx = player.x;
    const by = player.y - player.height / 2;

    switch(player.bulletType) {
        case 'normal':
            bullets.push({ x: bx, y: by, dx: 0, dy: -player.bulletSpeed, width: 4, height: 12, damage: player.bulletDamage, type: 'normal', pierce: 0 });
            break;
        case 'spread':
            for (let a = -20; a <= 20; a += 10) {
                const rad = a * Math.PI / 180;
                bullets.push({ x: bx, y: by, dx: Math.sin(rad) * player.bulletSpeed, dy: -Math.cos(rad) * player.bulletSpeed, width: 3, height: 10, damage: player.bulletDamage * 0.7, type: 'spread', pierce: 0 });
            }
            break;
        case 'laser':
            bullets.push({ x: bx, y: by, dx: 0, dy: -player.bulletSpeed * 1.5, width: 6, height: 20, damage: player.bulletDamage * 1.5, type: 'laser', pierce: 2 });
            break;
        case 'missile':
            bullets.push({ x: bx - 10, y: by, dx: 0, dy: -player.bulletSpeed * 0.8, width: 6, height: 14, damage: player.bulletDamage * 2, type: 'missile', pierce: 0, homing: true, target: null });
            bullets.push({ x: bx + 10, y: by, dx: 0, dy: -player.bulletSpeed * 0.8, width: 6, height: 14, damage: player.bulletDamage * 2, type: 'missile', pierce: 0, homing: true, target: null });
            break;
    }
}

function createExplosion(x, y, size, color) {
    explosions.push({
        x: x, y: y,
        size: size,
        maxSize: size,
        timer: 0,
        maxTimer: 30,
        color: color || '#ff6600',
        particles: []
    });

    for (let i = 0; i < size * 2; i++) {
        const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
        const speed = Math.random() * size / 5 + 1;
        particles.push({
            x: x, y: y,
            dx: Math.cos(angle) * speed,
            dy: Math.sin(angle) * speed,
            life: Math.random() * 30 + 20,
            maxLife: 50,
            size: Math.random() * 3 + 1,
            color: color || (Math.random() > 0.5 ? '#ff6600' : '#ffcc00')
        });
    }

    screenShake = Math.min(screenShake + size / 3, 15);
}

function addDamageNumber(x, y, damage, color) {
    damageNumbers.push({
        x: x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 20,
        y: y,
        text: Math.floor(damage).toString(),
        color: color || '#fff',
        life: 40,
        dy: -2
    });
}

function collides(a, b) {
    return a.x - a.width/2 < b.x + b.width/2 &&
           a.x + a.width/2 > b.x - b.width/2 &&
           a.y - a.height/2 < b.y + b.height/2 &&
           a.y + a.height/2 > b.y - b.height/2;
}

function dist(x1, y1, x2, y2) {
    return Math.sqrt((x2-x1)**2 + (y2-y1)**2);
}

// Update functions
function updatePlayer() {
    let moveX = 0, moveY = 0;

    if (keys['ArrowLeft'] || keys['KeyA']) moveX -= 1;
    if (keys['ArrowRight'] || keys['KeyD']) moveX += 1;
    if (keys['ArrowUp'] || keys['KeyW']) moveY -= 1;
    if (keys['ArrowDown'] || keys['KeyS']) moveY += 1;

    if (touchActive || mouseDown) {
        const dx = mouseX - player.x;
        const dy = mouseY - player.y;
        const d = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy);
        if (d > 5) {
            moveX = dx / d;
            moveY = dy / d;
        }
    }

    // Normalize diagonal
    if (moveX !== 0 && moveY !== 0) {
        moveX *= 0.707;
        moveY *= 0.707;
    }

    player.dx = moveX * player.speed;
    player.dy = moveY * player.speed;
    player.x += player.dx;
    player.y += player.dy;

    // Bounds
    player.x = Math.max(player.width/2, Math.min(canvas.width - player.width/2, player.x));
    player.y = Math.max(player.height/2, Math.min(canvas.height - player.height/2, player.y));

    // Fire
    player.fireTimer++;
    if (player.fireTimer >= player.fireRate) {
        player.fireTimer = 0;
        fireBullet();
    }

    // Power up timer
    if (player.powerUpTimer > 0) {
        player.powerUpTimer--;
        if (player.powerUpTimer <= 0) {
            player.bulletType = 'normal';
            player.fireRate = 10;
            player.bulletDamage = 10;
            player.speed = 5;
            player.magnetRange = 0;
        }
    }

    if (player.invincible > 0) player.invincible--;
    if (player.comboTimer > 0) {
        player.comboTimer--;
        if (player.comboTimer <= 0) player.combo = 0;
    }

    // Thrust particles
    player.thrustParticleTimer++;
    if (player.thrustParticleTimer >= 2) {
        player.thrustParticleTimer = 0;
        particles.push({
            x: player.x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 10,
            y: player.y + player.height/2,
            dx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5,
            dy: Math.random() * 2 + 1,
            life: 15 + Math.random() * 10,
            maxLife: 25,
            size: Math.random() * 3 + 1,
            color: Math.random() > 0.5 ? '#00aaff' : '#0066ff'
        });
    }
}

function updateBullets() {
    for (let i = bullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        let b = bullets[i];

        // Homing missiles
        if (b.homing) {
            let closest = null;
            let closestDist = Infinity;
            [...enemies, ...bosses].forEach(e => {
                let d = dist(b.x, b.y, e.x, e.y);
                if (d < closestDist) { closestDist = d; closest = e; }
            });
            if (closest) {
                let angle = Math.atan2(closest.y - b.y, closest.x - b.x);
                let currentAngle = Math.atan2(b.dy, b.dx);
                let diff = angle - currentAngle;
                while (diff > Math.PI) diff -= Math.PI * 2;
                while (diff < -Math.PI) diff += Math.PI * 2;
                currentAngle += diff * 0.08;
                let speed = Math.sqrt(b.dx*b.dx + b.dy*b.dy);
                b.dx = Math.cos(currentAngle) * speed;
                b.dy = Math.sin(currentAngle) * speed;
            }
            // Trail
            particles.push({
                x: b.x, y: b.y,
                dx: (Math.random()-0.5)*0.5, dy: Math.random()*0.5,
                life: 10, maxLife: 10, size: 2,
                color: '#ff4400'
            });
        }

        b.x += b.dx;
        b.y += b.dy;

        if (b.y < -20 || b.y > canvas.height + 20 || b.x < -20 || b.x > canvas.width + 20) {
            bullets.splice(i, 1);
        }
    }

    for (let i = enemyBullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        let b = enemyBullets[i];
        b.x += b.dx;
        b.y += b.dy;
        if (b.timer !== undefined) b.timer++;

        if (b.y < -20 || b.y > canvas.height + 20 || b.x < -20 || b.x > canvas.width + 20) {
            enemyBullets.splice(i, 1);
        }
    }
}

function updateEnemies() {
    for (let i = enemies.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        let e = enemies[i];
        e.angle += 0.02;

        switch(e.behavior) {
            case 'straight':
                e.y += e.speed;
                break;
            case 'zigzag':
                e.y += e.speed;
                e.x += Math.sin(e.phase + e.y * 0.03) * 2;
                break;
            case 'sine':
                e.y += e.speed;
                e.x += Math.sin(e.phase + e.y * 0.02) * 3;
                break;
            case 'chase':
                let dx = player.x - e.x;
                let dy = player.y - e.y;
                let d = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy);
                if (d > 0) {
                    e.x += (dx/d) * e.speed * 0.5;
                    e.y += Math.max(e.speed * 0.3, (dy/d) * e.speed * 0.5);
                }
                break;
        }

        // Fire
        e.fireTimer++;
        if (e.fireTimer >= e.fireRate && e.y > 0 && e.y < canvas.height * 0.7) {
            e.fireTimer = 0;
            let angle = Math.atan2(player.y - e.y, player.x - e.x);
            let speed = 3;

            if (e.type === 'tank') {
                for (let a = -15; a <= 15; a += 15) {
                    let rad = angle + a * Math.PI / 180;
                    enemyBullets.push({ x: e.x, y: e.y + e.height/2, dx: Math.cos(rad)*speed, dy: Math.sin(rad)*speed, width: 5, height: 5, damage: 10, type: 'enemy' });
                }
            } else if (e.type === 'bomber') {
                for (let a = 0; a < 360; a += 60) {
                    let rad = a * Math.PI / 180;
                    enemyBullets.push({ x: e.x, y: e.y, dx: Math.cos(rad)*2.5, dy: Math.sin(rad)*2.5, width: 4, height: 4, damage: 8, type: 'enemy' });
                }
            } else {
                enemyBullets.push({ x: e.x, y: e.y + e.height/2, dx: Math.cos(angle)*speed, dy: Math.sin(angle)*speed, width: 4, height: 4, damage: 8, type: 'enemy' });
            }
        }

        // Off screen
        if (e.y > canvas.height + 60) {
            enemies.splice(i, 1);
        }
    }
}

function updateBosses() {
    for (let i = bosses.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        let b = bosses[i];

        if (b.entering) {
            b.y += 1;
            if (b.y >= b.targetY) {
                b.entering = false;
            }
            continue;
        }

        b.phase += 0.02;
        b.x = canvas.width/2 + Math.sin(b.phase) * (canvas.width/3 - 50);
        b.y = b.targetY + Math.sin(b.phase * 1.5) * 30;

        if (b.hitFlash > 0) b.hitFlash--;

        // Rage mode at 30% hp
        if (!b.rage && b.hp < b.maxHp * 0.3) {
            b.rage = true;
            screenShake = 10;
        }

        // Fire patterns
        b.patternTimer++;
        let rateMultiplier = b.rage ? 0.5 : 1;

        if (b.patternTimer >= b.patternDuration * rateMultiplier) {
            b.patternTimer = 0;
            b.firePattern = (b.firePattern + 1) % 4;
        }

        b.fireTimer++;
        let fireDelay = b.rage ? 8 : 15;

        switch(b.firePattern) {
            case 0: // Spiral
                if (b.fireTimer >= fireDelay) {
                    b.fireTimer = 0;
                    let angle = b.phase * 5;
                    for (let j = 0; j < 2; j++) {
                        let a = angle + j * Math.PI;
                        enemyBullets.push({ x: b.x, y: b.y + b.height/2, dx: Math.cos(a)*3, dy: Math.sin(a)*3, width: 5, height: 5, damage: 12, type: 'boss' });
                    }
                }
                break;
            case 1: // Aimed burst
                if (b.fireTimer >= fireDelay * 2) {
                    b.fireTimer = 0;
                    let angle = Math.atan2(player.y - b.y, player.x - b.x);
                    for (let j = -2; j <= 2; j++) {
                        let a = angle + j * 0.15;
                        enemyBullets.push({ x: b.x, y: b.y + b.height/2, dx: Math.cos(a)*4, dy: Math.sin(a)*4, width: 6, height: 6, damage: 15, type: 'boss' });
                    }
                }
                break;
            case 2: // Ring
                if (b.fireTimer >= fireDelay * 3) {
                    b.fireTimer = 0;
                    let count = b.rage ? 24 : 16;
                    for (let j = 0; j < count; j++) {
                        let a = (j / count) * Math.PI * 2;
                        enemyBullets.push({ x: b.x, y: b.y, dx: Math.cos(a)*2.5, dy: Math.sin(a)*2.5, width: 5, height: 5, damage: 10, type: 'boss' });
                    }
                }
                break;
            case 3: // Laser streams
                if (b.fireTimer >= 5) {
                    b.fireTimer = 0;
                    let angle = Math.atan2(player.y - b.y, player.x - b.x);
                    enemyBullets.push({ x: b.x - 30, y: b.y + b.height/2, dx: Math.cos(angle)*5, dy: Math.sin(angle)*5, width: 4, height: 8, damage: 8, type: 'boss' });
                    enemyBullets.push({ x: b.x + 30, y: b.y + b.height/2, dx: Math.cos(angle)*5, dy: Math.sin(angle)*5, width: 4, height: 8, damage: 8, type: 'boss' });
                }
                break;
        }

        // Parts fire
        b.parts.forEach(p => {
            if (!p.alive) return;
            p.fireTimer++;
            if (p.fireTimer >= 40) {
                p.fireTimer = 0;
                let px = b.x + p.xOff;
                let py = b.y + p.yOff;
                let angle = Math.atan2(player.y - py, player.x - px);
                enemyBullets.push({ x: px, y: py, dx: Math.cos(angle)*3.5, dy: Math.sin(angle)*3.5, width: 5, height: 5, damage: 10, type: 'boss' });
            }
        });

        // Boss defeated
        if (b.hp <= 0) {
            createExplosion(b.x, b.y, 60, '#ff0000');
            createExplosion(b.x - 30, b.y - 20, 40, '#ff6600');
            createExplosion(b.x + 30, b.y + 10, 40, '#ffcc00');
            score += b.points;
            bossDefeated++;
            bossSpawned = false;

            // Drop multiple power-ups
            for (let j = 0; j < 3; j++) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    spawnPowerUp(b.x + (Math.random()-0.5)*60, b.y + (Math.random()-0.5)*60);
                }, j * 100);
            }

            bosses.splice(i, 1);
            wave++;
        }
    }
}

function updatePowerUps() {
    for (let i = powerUps.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        let p = powerUps[i];
        p.y += p.speed;
        p.timer++;
        p.glow = Math.sin(p.timer * 0.1) * 0.3 + 0.7;

        // Magnet effect
        if (player.magnetRange > 0) {
            let d = dist(p.x, p.y, player.x, player.y);
            if (d < player.magnetRange) {
                let dx = player.x - p.x;
                let dy = player.y - p.y;
                p.x += dx / d * 3;
                p.y += dy / d * 3;
            }
        }

        if (p.y > canvas.height + 20) {
            powerUps.splice(i, 1);
        }
    }
}

function updateParticles() {
    for (let i = particles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        let p = particles[i];
        p.x += p.dx;
        p.y += p.dy;
        p.life--;
        p.dx *= 0.98;
        p.dy *= 0.98;
        if (p.life <= 0) particles.splice(i, 1);
    }
